No Poverty.reason: Course discusses tax systems which can influence economic resources and property rights (Target 1.4).
evidence: 土地及建物課稅的基本概念

Quality Education.reason: Course provides knowledge on taxation which can support educational outcomes (Target 4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Taxation impacts economic growth and job creation (Target 8.3).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Taxation can address inequalities in resource distribution (Target 10.4).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Course covers legal principles which relate to justice and governance (Target 16.3).

No Poverty.reason: Links to Target 1.4 (control over land/property) via discussions on inheritance tax and principles like 'fairness and ability to pay' (公平課稅與量能課稅).

Zero Hunger.reason: Connects to Target 2.3 (access to land) through its specific discussion of 'agricultural land related taxes' (農地相關稅賦), though this is a minor topic.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides professional knowledge (Target 4.4), but its content is not focused on education itself.
evidence: 具備地政相關專業知能

Gender Equality.reason: Relates to Target 5.a (equal rights to property/inheritance) by covering 'inheritance tax' (遺產稅與贈與稅), a key policy tool for ensuring economic equality.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Addresses Target 8.3 by examining 'economic principles of taxation' (課稅經濟原則) and 'tax efficiency' (課稅效率), which are fundamental to development-oriented economic policies.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Connects to Target 9.1 (infrastructure) by analyzing 'Land development benefits and burdens' (土地開發之利益與負擔), a key concept for funding public infrastructure through land taxation.
evidence: 土地開發之利益與負擔

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Directly addresses Target 10.4 (fiscal policy for equality) through core principles like 'fairness and ability to pay' (公平課稅與量能課稅) and tools like 'inheritance tax'.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Core to Target 11.1 and 11.3. The course focuses on 'land value tax' (地價稅) and 'house tax' (房屋稅), essential tools for managing sustainable urbanization and housing.
evidence: 土地開發之利益與負擔

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Links to Target 12.2 (efficient use of natural resources) by analyzing 'tax efficiency' (課稅效率), which can influence the sustainable management of land as a resource.
evidence: 土地開發之利益與負擔

Life on Land.reason: Connects to Target 15.9 by discussing 'agricultural land related taxes' (農地相關稅賦), which can be used in local planning to influence land use and conservation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Core to Target 16.3 and 16.6. The course details the 'Constitutional concept of tax' (憲法上稅之觀念) and 'tax collection law' (稅捐稽徵法), building accountable institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Directly supports Target 17.1 (domestic resource mobilization) by teaching the principles and practice of 'tax collection law' (稅捐稽徵法) and 'tax calculation'.
evidence: 熟悉土地及建物相關稅額計算
